channel.title: Agentic Programming on ~# cr1s1um > /dev/random
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic Programming on ~# cr1s1um > /dev/random

item.title: /* Agentic Programming with AI: Python Port Scanner on Windows */
item.description: A simple practical example of agentic programming with ChatGPT, Codex CLI, Python, Git and GitHub on Windows. We build a small educational port scanner.
